=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (4:24-4:41) TS377021: The `catch` callback in `Effect.tryPromise` returns `unknown`, so the Effect error type stays untyped. A specific typed error preserves error-channel information, for example by narrowing the value or wrapping it in `Data.TaggedError`. effect(unknownInEffectCatch)
  Fix 0: "Disable unknownInEffectCatch for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unknownInEffectCatch for entire file"

[D2] (18:36-18:53) TS377021: The `catch` callback in `Effect.tryPromise` returns `unknown`, so the Effect error type stays untyped. A specific typed error preserves error-channel information, for example by narrowing the value or wrapping it in `Data.TaggedError`. effect(unknownInEffectCatch)
  Fix 0: "Disable unknownInEffectCatch for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unknownInEffectCatch for entire file"

[D3] (23:42-23:59) TS377021: The `catch` callback in `Effect.tryPromise` returns `unknown`, so the Effect error type stays untyped. A specific typed error preserves error-channel information, for example by narrowing the value or wrapping it in `Data.TaggedError`. effect(unknownInEffectCatch)
  Fix 0: "Disable unknownInEffectCatch for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unknownInEffectCatch for entire file"
